patient_summary: Olivia, a 73-year-old female (Patient ID 104), has documented hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Active care team members include PCP Curtis L. Hershey, MD; consulting cardiology (Justin D. Roberts, DO); endocrinology (Deepika Pradhan Shrestha, MD); hematology/oncology (Jocelyn Wozney, MD; Ami Jhaveri, MD); and others. Recent notable labs: lipid panel (07/17/2020) CHOLTOTAL 136, TG 101, HDL 38 (L), LDL 78; BMP (01/11/2021) GLUCOSE 199 (H), SODIUM 134 (L), BUN 37 (H), CREATININE 1.1 (H), GFR 50 (A); LFTs (01/08/2021) AST 8 (L), ALT 10. Social history: former cigarette smoker (0.3 packs/day for 2 years, 03/22/1971-03/22/1973), no current alcohol use. Goals include blood pressure <140/90 (recorded 128/78 on 01/11/2025) and diabetes self-management tasks. Documented additional concerns include prior MRSA (R breast 09/03/2020-09/04/2020) and recovered COVID-19. There are conflicting DOB and phone entries in the record (see conflicts).
